question: The chart shows the company expense breakdown by category. Based on this data, which of the following conclusions can be made?

options.A: Marketing accounts for the largest share of expenses.
options.B: Salaries account for the largest share of expenses.
options.C: R&D accounts for the largest share of expenses.
options.D: Utilities and Rent together account for more than half of the expenses.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Marketing: 40%; Salaries: 20%; R&D: 15%; Rent: 10%; Other: 8%; Utilities: 7%.
